title: crocus biflorus var. pestalozzae
intro: Crocus biflorus var. pestalozzae, commonly known as Crocus pestalozzae, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Crocus pestalozzae include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of dried flowers or roots, and can be consumed as a tea, added to soups, or used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
